name: Figs-kaiju paradise
description: Figs is an insectile Raytraxian character from the game Kaiju Paradise a light blue insect-like kaiju with turquoise stripes, white joints, and dark blue fur accents. It has three turquoise horns, four large orange wings, and a stinger, resembling a cross between a fruit fly and a hornet.
creator: Faze9576
